text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The mighty crimson Phantom Bird swoops onto
the track! It's the one, the only, El Condor
Pasaaa!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ooh, I'm just itchin' to do some running!
choice_data_list: You look like you're in a good mood today!
You look like you're in a good mood today!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Sí! I'm feeling great! Fired up! Scorchin'!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I don't care who I'm up against, there's no chance
I'm losin'!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa is here to dominate the race
todayyy!
